title: All Your Favorite Gadgets Are Getting Way More Expensive … Again
summary: Thanks to the AI-driven chip shortage, prices for phones, computers, and consoles are sky-high—and still climbing.
claim: All Your Favorite Gadgets Are Getting Way More Expensive … Again
myth_angle: The claim that all gadgets are getting way more expensive due to the chip shortage might be exaggerated, and price increases could be driven by marketing hype, luxury branding, and other factors.
verify_reason: The snippets show that some gadgets are overhyped and not worth the price, with experts and reviewers pushing back against marketing claims, suggesting that the price increases might be due to factors other than just the chip shortage.

title: The FDA Ruled That ZYN Pouches Are Safer Than Cigarettes. That Doesn’t Mean They’re Safe
summary: ZYN nicotine pouches, the FDA found, can be advertised as a less-harmful option for adult smokers. But quitting all tobacco and nicotine products remains the best idea.
claim: The FDA Ruled That ZYN Pouches Are Safer Than Cigarettes
myth_angle: While the FDA allows ZYN pouches to be marketed as less harmful than cigarettes, the ruling does not equate to safety, and there are significant concerns about their impact, especially on youth.
verify_reason: The snippets confirm the FDA ruling but also highlight that it does not mean ZYN pouches are safe, only that they can be marketed as less harmful than cigarettes, and there are concerns about their appeal to young people and lack of approval as smoking cessation products.
